$schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Product Bio pipeline. The deterministic orchestrator run_product_bio.py walks these phases IN ORDER (P0->P6) with NO phase skips. Each phase declares its produces_artifact, its _chk_* preflight symbol, and its AF-PB-* gate codes. Every AF-PB-* code below is enforced by a fail-closed, model-free, stdlib-only prover in scripts/; py_symbol names the function that decides it. Editing this file is step (i) of any Product Bio change: add the gate, add the AF code here with its trigger, add the checker, add the golden+attack fixture.
design_law: Enforcement, not description. Bands and counts are measured on the STRIPPED text of the artifact; a model's self-reported word count / close count is NEVER trusted. Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own provider chain (model-map.template.json) — NEVER Anthropic/claude-* ids or operator keys. The deterministic gates are provider-neutral Python that run identically everywhere. A client-exact override (e.g. an exact word target) wins over the default band and is recorded on the certificate.

phases.name: Intake (the 4 required fields, one block, turn-gated)

preflight.label: working/intake.json present and prove_pb_intake.py PASS — product_name / product_description / first_name / last_name all present and non-whitespace. A self-attested completeness flag is never trusted.

phases.name: Prompt fidelity (the baked IP has not drifted)

preflight.label: prove_pb_fidelity.py PASS — sha256 of the two baked prompt assets equals the recorded source pins. The IP cannot silently drift.

phases.name: Bio authoring (ONE call, system = prompt 01 verbatim, client model)

preflight.label: working/product-bio.md present (the 6,000-7,000-word, 10-section master-brain bio authored on the client's own long-output tier).

phases.name: Bio QC (fail-closed floor provers over the authored bio)

preflight.label: prove_pb_wordcount.py PASS + prove_pb_sections.py PASS over working/product-bio.md (--intake working/intake.json threads the LOGGED client-exact override channel). ANY AF-PB-* violation blocks advance; a bounded rework loop (<=3, verifier != author) re-authors then re-proves. A client-exact word/section target LOGGED in the locked brief (word_count_override / section_count_overrides) wins over the default band and is recorded on the certificate; an override applied but not logged is AF-PB-OVERRIDE-UNLOGGED.

phases.name: HTML conversion (ONE call, system = prompt 02 verbatim, client model)

preflight.label: working/product-bio.html present (the Google-Docs-importable HTML). Envelope auto-trim is the ONLY permitted repair and is logged.
prove_pb_html.py PASS over working/product-bio.html (--source-bio working/product-bio.md). Strict envelope, exactly one h1, no CSS beyond page-break-after, content-loss within tolerance.

phases.name: Deliver (labeled local bundle + handoff; certificate issued on a full pass)

preflight.label: the labeled deliverable bundle is ASSEMBLED from the QC'd working copies and byte-verified: delivery/product-bio-<slug>.md + .html must equal the P3/P5-proven working/product-bio.md + .html (a pre-existing delivery artifact that disagrees is refused — AF-PB-DELIVER-MISMATCH; missing QC'd copies are AF-PB-STAGE-SKIPPED). After the full P0->P5 pass issues the signed certificate, the client-facing bundle is written to ~/Downloads/Product-Bio-<slug>-<MM-DD-YYYY>/ (bio, HTML, DELIVERY-NOTE.md, handoff.json, PROCESS-CERTIFICATE.json/.md) — the Downloads root is overridable via PRODUCT_BIO_DELIVERY_ROOT so a test never touches the real ~/Downloads; NO n8n / Google Drive / Slack / Gmail. The Command Center card carries the deliverable pointer (bundle path + certificate sha). No hardcoded delivery channels; any push is per-client config through the client's own gateway, client-silent by default.

autofails.trigger: any of the 4 required fields (product_name / product_description / first_name / last_name) missing, empty, or whitespace
sha256 of a baked prompt asset != its recorded source pin, an asset is missing, or an unpinned prompt file appeared
measured stripped word count outside 6,000-7,000 (self-reported count ignored; whitespace padding is inert)
the mandatory COMPLETION VERIFICATION block is absent
any of the 10 mandatory sections absent or out of order (matched on header lines only)
signature-close styles != 24 distinct named styles (PRD O3 enforces the tracker's 24, not the 20 taught)
a per-section floor missed: 10 intros / 15-20 adjectives / 8-10 objections / 10-12 FAQs / 8-10 social-proof / a missing StoryBrand beat

a word-band (word_count_override) or per-section count (section_count_overrides) override was APPLIED but is not present-and-equal in the locked brief (--intake); the SACRED default band is not relaxed by an unlogged value. A client-exact target LOGGED in the locked brief wins verbatim and is recorded on the certificate (never floored/capped). The SACRED STRUCTURE — 10 sections, order, 24 named closes, 7 StoryBrand beats — has NO override channel.
output does not start EXACTLY '<!DOCTYPE html>' or end EXACTLY '</html>' (after the one permitted auto-trim)
the document does not contain exactly one <h1>
any CSS beyond page-break-after (a <style> block, or an inline style with any other property)
content coverage vs the source bio below the 90% token tolerance (content lost in conversion)
a phase was attempted out of order or the certificate chain is broken; at P6, the QC'd working/product-bio.md or .html is missing so no bundle can be assembled

a pre-existing delivery/product-bio-<slug>.md/.html disagrees byte-for-byte with the QC'd working copy (a swap-after-QC / planted deliverable), or the assembled bundle did not round-trip byte-identical
a certificate was requested without a full P0->P5 pass
a hand-rolled uploader/notifier (Google Drive / Slack / Gmail / n8n webhook) is present in the run directory, bypassing the local-labeled-deliverable handoff
the enforcement-pair hash does not match the pinned head (ENGINE-PIN.sha256)
a claude-* / anthropic model id appears in the shipped skill or the resolved client-path model map
